description: Increase in units sold, traffic, or active customers
notes: Includes unit case volume, transaction count, active customer growth.

description: Decrease in units sold, traffic, or active customers
notes: Includes volume deleverage, lower unit sales, traffic declines.

description: Growth in sales from stores or units open for a full comparable period
notes: Comp sales, same-store sales, like-for-like growth.

description: Net new active customers, members, or subscribers added
notes: Loyalty sign-ups, new account growth, subscriber additions.

description: Higher average selling price, pricing actions, or improved pricing mix
notes: ASP increase, list price increases, reduced discounting.

description: Lower average selling price, promotional pricing, or ASP decline
notes: Price investment, promotional pricing, ASP compression.

description: Shift in sales composition toward higher-margin products or categories
notes: Premiumization, trading up, higher-margin SKU growth.

description: Shift in sales composition toward lower-margin products or categories
notes: Trading down, value-tier growth outpacing premium.

description: Shift toward higher-margin channels such as DTC, e-commerce, or own retail
notes: DTC growth, direct channel expansion, away-from-home channel recovery.

description: Shift toward lower-margin channels such as off-trade or mass retail
notes: Wholesale shift, mass channel growth, distributor-led sales increase.

description: Change in regional or country composition of revenue affecting margins
notes: Can be positive or negative. Emerging market mix, developed market share shift.

description: Higher commodity, raw material, or ingredient costs
notes: Commodity inflation, packaging cost pressure, ingredient cost headwind.

description: Lower commodity, raw material, or ingredient costs
notes: Commodity tailwind, raw material deflation, input cost relief.

description: Higher shipping, logistics, or carrier rates
notes: Elevated freight, logistics inflation, carrier rate increases, supply chain costs.

description: Lower shipping, logistics, or carrier rates
notes: Freight tailwind, normalizing logistics costs, carrier rate relief.

description: Higher wage, headcount, or employee benefits costs
notes: Wage inflation, minimum wage increases, headcount growth costs, benefits expense.

description: Lower labor costs from restructuring, automation, or headcount reduction
notes: Restructuring savings, automation benefit, workforce optimization.

description: Higher markdowns, trade promotion, or promotional investment
notes: Higher markdowns, elevated promotions, trade spend increase, promotional intensity.

description: Lower markdowns, cleaner inventory, or reduced trade promotion
notes: Reduced markdowns, leaner inventory, lower promotional intensity, cleaner sell-through.

description: Cost savings from operational efficiency, lean programs, or procurement
notes: Procurement savings, operational leverage, efficiency programs, cost discipline.

description: Impact of translating foreign currency results into reporting currency
notes: Can be positive or negative depending on currency moves and exposure.

description: Adverse foreign exchange impact on reported results
notes: Unfavorable FX, currency headwind, adverse translation impact.

description: Favorable foreign exchange impact on reported results
notes: Favorable FX, currency tailwind, positive translation impact.

description: Expansion of direct-to-consumer sales channel
notes: DTC expansion, own retail growth, brand.com growth, direct sales increase.

description: Growth in online and digital sales channel
notes: Online channel growth, digital sales increase, omnichannel expansion.

description: Change in mix between wholesale and direct retail channels
notes: Can be positive or negative. Wholesale expansion or contraction.

description: Net new store or door openings contributing to revenue
notes: New store openings, net new doors, retail footprint expansion.

description: Internally driven revenue growth excluding acquisitions and FX
notes: Organic sales growth, underlying growth, constant currency organic growth.

description: Revenue or profit contribution from acquired businesses
notes: M&A contribution, inorganic growth, acquired revenue.

description: Revenue or profit lost from divested businesses
notes: Disposed businesses, sold brands, portfolio pruning impact.

description: Net new retail distribution points added in the period
notes: New doors, distribution expansion, retail placement gains.

description: Entry into new geographies or product categories
notes: New market entry, category expansion, geographic diversification.

description: Non-cash write-down of goodwill, intangibles, or other assets
notes: Goodwill impairment, brand impairment, asset write-down.

description: Restructuring charges or savings from transformation programs
notes: Can be a charge (negative) or savings benefit (positive). Label direction explicitly.

description: Legal settlement charge or recovery
notes: Legal charge, settlement cost, litigation provision.

description: Adverse weather, natural disaster, or macro disruption impact
notes: Weather disruption, natural disaster impact, macro shock.

description: Excess inventory, obsolescence charges, or inventory destocking
notes: Inventory write-down, excess inventory, destocking headwind, obsolescence charge.

description: General inflationary pressure across multiple cost lines
notes: Use when inflation is cited broadly rather than tied to a specific cost driver.
